content:
# Best Free AI Tools for Nonprofits in 2026

Nonprofits work hard to make the world better, and tight budgets shouldn't hold you back. These free AI tools will help you increase your impact!

Explore our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] Free: Write Amazing Content for Free

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]'s free plan gives you 10,000 characters per month — perfect for writing grant proposals, social media posts, and newsletters.

### Why Rytr for Nonprofits?
- **Grant writing templates**: Specifically for nonprofit funding requests
- **Emotional tone options**: Perfect for connecting with donors
- **Multiple languages**: Reach diverse communities

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## Canva Free: Design Professional Materials

Canva's free plan is incredibly powerful for nonprofits. You can create flyers, social media graphics, presentations, and more.

### Canva for Nonprofits
- **Thousands of templates**: For every nonprofit need
- **Free images & icons**: No need to pay for stock photos
- **Collaboration**: Work with your team for free

---

## ChatGPT Free: Your AI Assistant

ChatGPT's free tier is perfect for brainstorming, research, and drafting all kinds of content.

### How Nonprofits Use ChatGPT
- **Brainstorm fundraising ideas**: Get creative campaign ideas
- **Simplify complex topics**: Explain your mission in plain language
- **Translate content**: Reach more people in their native language

---

## Our Recommendations by Use Case

| Task | Tool |
|------|------|
| Writing grant proposals | [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] |
| Designing marketing materials | Canva |
| Brainstorming & research | ChatGPT |
| Managing projects | [[link:/tools/100|Notion]] Free |

Ready to do more good with AI? Try these free tools today!

For more insights, check out our guide: [[link:/blog/best-free-ai-writing-tools-2026|Best Free AI Writing Tools 2026]]
